members.name: Lock
members.summary: Locks this [Mutex], blocks until it is unlocked by the current owner. [b]Note:[/b] This function returns without blocking if the thread already has ownership of the mutex.

members.name: TryLock
members.summary: Tries locking this [Mutex], but does not block. Returns [code]true[/code] on success, [code]false[/code] otherwise. [b]Note:[/b] This function returns [code]true[/code] if the thread already has ownership of the mutex.

members.name: Unlock
members.summary: Unlocks this [Mutex], leaving it to other threads. [b]Note:[/b] If a thread called [method lock] or [method try_lock] multiple times while already having ownership of the mutex, it must also call [method unlock] the same number of times in order to unlock it correctly. [b]Warning:[/b] Calling [method unlock] more times than [method lock] on a given thread, thus ending up trying to unlock a non-locked mutex, is wrong and may causes crashes or deadlocks.
